The '''''Geddawai''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] owned by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Stationed on Rebel outpost ''[[DS 5]]'' in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the ''Geddawai'' was used as an escape vehicle by the rogue [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] when Imperial authorities caught up with him. Despite the deployment of a decoy and the confusion of the surrounding scene as the Imperials closed in, the ship was disabled by an [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing]] piloted by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], and was captured by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. The vessel was then flown into the hangar of [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']], and its occupants, Harkov among them removed for interrogation. It is unknown what the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] did with the ship after its capture.

==Behind the scenes==
Since many ships of the X-wing series of games are anagrams and puns of names and phrases, ''Geddawai'' could probably stand for ''get away''. This makes sense as Harkov had intended to escape the Imperials on this vessel.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
